headline: Is Federal Realty Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: FRT heads into Q1 earnings results with steady rent growth hopes, but rising interest costs and softer retail trends may test its resilience.

headline: Is Regency Centers Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: REG eyes Q1 growth as the grocery-anchored portfolio and leasing strength support revenues and FFO in a softer retail market.

headline: Is Kimco Realty Stock a Smart Buy Before Q1 Earnings Release?
summary: KIM heads into Q1 earnings results with modest revenue and FFO growth expected, but retail softness, rising vacancies and higher interest costs may have tempered its performance.
